project_type: React 18 SPA with Vite, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript - DMS (Driver Monitoring System) Cockpit Dashboard
build_system: Vite 5.4 with pnpm (no node_modules currently installed)
build_command: npx tsc --noEmit (cannot run - no node_modules, INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network)
test_command: npx vitest run (cannot run - no node_modules, INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network)
verification_instructions: Since node_modules is not installed and network is INTEGRATIONS_ONLY (npm registry blocked), verification must be done via AST/syntax inspection only. Ensure no TypeScript errors by careful code review. Check that all imports exist and types are correct.
setup_instructions: Cannot install - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode blocks npm registry access
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - npm registry blocked, cannot install packages, cannot run build/test commands. node_modules directory does not exist. All verification must be done via code inspection and grep-based validation. No new dependencies allowed.
contribution_requirements: Do not modify: src/services/, src/hooks/useTelemetry.ts. No new npm packages. Must use only React, TypeScript, Tailwind, Recharts, Lucide-react.
key_patterns: Components in src/components/cockpit/. Each component receives DMSTelemetry as 'data' prop. Tailwind classes used extensively with custom colors (dms-dark, dms-panel, dms-accent #00d4ff, dms-warning, dms-danger, dms-success, lteps-*). SVG used for visualizations. DriverState enum values are lowercase strings (attentive, drowsy, distracted, fatigued, phone_use).
directory_structure: src/components/cockpit/ contains all 6 panel components. src/types/dms.ts has all type definitions. src/services/ has telemetry providers (DO NOT MODIFY). src/hooks/ has useTelemetry hook (DO NOT MODIFY). Dashboard.tsx is the main layout component.
